# All values are exact rationals num/den.

## Eisenstein coefficients e_delta(g~) (Fricke side), exact
e_1(g~) = -3844162174247041993075493011898798101761251580896540018232454555757284468324712219970183288107824059761421114044891935251/9157296672987741794294756672627598367365088909032997050650566974741786851680353912055621157151032496279857626619446040150590226657792
    ~= -4.197922500e-13

    ~= 5.361610843e-05

## r3 = e_1 + e_3/(1+3^17) (binding gcd=3 combination), exact
r3 = -5457122238196136660153709392343747951489516651199058808062321770474759757050409198580680414305836183881468995343745842336891769/1182574794146291345304879141043222364087659829587102320532530525811138211679044579780904493356354109338910203798286027214197806567384430757888
    ~= -4.614610649e-15
COEF18*r3 = 147342300431295689824150153593281194690216949582374587817682687802818513440361048361678371186257576964799662874281137743096077763/48755647081593385756098809473818642335933621940317121705639583247892105198989331373354264483142091836813885253777643943425954117191215060203264
    ~= 3.022056095e-15

## scans: a_n>=0 and b_n>=0 verified exactly for 1<=n<=800 (0 negatives each side)
